justification: The diff correctly updates Java version to 21 in CI and pom.xml, migrates javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence, and replaces String.format with String.formatted() (Java 15+ idiom). It also removes unused imports and switches to constructor injection. However, it retains Hibernate 5 (via spring-boot-starter-parent 3.3.13 which defaults to Hibernate 6, but the explicit hibernate-core dependency is removed, relying on Spring Boot's managed version which is Hibernate 6.2+ in 3.3.x, so this is actually a Hibernate 5->6 migration implicitly). The diff is coherent with no spurious churn. The only minor issue is the addition of junit:junit alongside junit-jupiter, which is unnecessary but harmless.
